content:
Account: MUS8765432109876543210
Owner: 'A. Mehta' (Nominee)
Opening Date: June 25, 2022
Documents submitted: Expired passport of Dr. Priya Nair (issued 2015, expired 2020), notarized power of attorney from 'A. Mehta' (signature mismatch), and a fake utility bill from Port Louis.

The account was opened by agent 'R. Singh' — registered to a shell firm 'Global Trust Advisors Ltd.' in Port Louis. The real beneficiary, as per wire transfer logs and subsequent property purchase, is Arjun Mehta.

No business activity recorded. Funds withdrawn in single transaction of ₹6.0 crore to Goa. No tax filings. Account closed on Sept 1, 2022.

Conclusion: This was a classic layering technique to obscure origin of funds. Dr. Nair’s expired passport was used — access only possible by Arjun Mehta, who had physical possession of her documents during her medical leave.
